name: Competitive Battlecard Builder
description: Build an interactive comparison app, either a sales battlecard advocating for your product against named competitors, or a neutral, unbiased comparison across two or more peer items with no side taken. Filterable by item and category, with live search, a compact scorecard, and copy-to-clipboard talking points. Every claim is tagged verified or unverified so nothing invented ends up in front of a customer. Exports to PowerPoint on request, with support for a real branding template.
author: Michael Heath
